complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Enrich TDD execution agent criteria with curated vocabulary from mattpocock skills
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt:
Break down the agent enrichment task into 4 surgical subtasks, one per agent file (.claude/agents/guardian.md, test-author.md, mobile.md, supabase.md). Each subtask should:

1. Identify the specific sections to enhance (e.g., guardian: add "Test quality" section; test-author: enhance Step 0/1 for seams annotation; mobile/supabase: enhance "Verification" section)
2. Extract and translate relevant vocabulary from mattpocock/skills (tdd, implement, code-review) to Urbea's stack (Edge Functions, RLS/pgTAP, Expo/React Native)
3. Inject curated content (seams definition, 3 anti-patterns for guardian, 4 Fowler smells subset for mobile/supabase)
4. Verify no enforcement mechanisms are changed (tdd-guard.sh remains untouched, structured output formats preserved)

Each subtask is independent and can be completed sequentially. Verification is human review only (non-critical path per CLAUDE.md §5).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Complexity score 3/10 because: (1) ZERO new code - only editing 4 markdown prompt files (~166 lines total), (2) No enforcement changes - tdd-guard.sh and workflow remain untouched, (3) Clear scope with surgical injection points already defined in task details, (4) Non-critical path means no RED/GREEN/guardian cycle needed - verification is human review, (5) Source material exists but requires curation/translation (not verbatim copying), (6) Requires understanding of both Urbea's TDD workflow and mattpocock's vocabulary, but no complex technical implementation. This is primarily a content/prompt engineering task with clear constraints. Similar in complexity to documentation updates but requires deeper domain knowledge of TDD patterns. 4 subtasks recommended (1 per agent file) for clean separation and focused edits.
